channel.title: The Fine-Tuning Index
channel.description: The living index of LLM fine-tuning & post-training tooling — PEFT, LoRA, RLHF, trainers.

item.title: hiyouga/LlamaFactory — momentum 87
item.description: Unified Efficient Fine-Tuning of 100+ LLMs & VLMs (ACL 2024)

item.title: unslothai/unsloth — momentum 87
item.description: Unsloth Studio is a web UI for training and running open models like Gemma 4, Qwen3.6, DeepSeek, gpt-oss locally.

item.title: huggingface/peft — momentum 81
item.description: 🤗 PEFT: State-of-the-art Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning.

item.title: modelscope/ms-swift — momentum 79
item.description: Use PEFT or Full-parameter to CPT/SFT/DPO/GRPO 600+ LLMs (Qwen3.6, DeepSeek-V4, GLM-5.1, InternLM3, Llama4, ...) and 300+ MLLMs (Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Omni, InternVL3.5, Ovis2.5, GLM4.5v, Gemma4, Llava, Phi4, ...) (AAAI 2025).

item.title: bentoml/OpenLLM — momentum 78
item.description: Run any open-source LLMs, such as DeepSeek and Llama, as OpenAI compatible API endpoint in the cloud.

item.title: axolotl-ai-cloud/axolotl — momentum 78
item.description: Go ahead and axolotl questions

item.title: ludwig-ai/ludwig — momentum 78
item.description: Low-code framework for building custom LLMs, neural networks, and other AI models

item.title: oumi-ai/oumi — momentum 77
item.description: Easily fine-tune, evaluate and deploy Gemma 4, Qwen3.5, Qwen3.6, gpt-oss, DeepSeek-R1, or any open source LLM / VLM!

item.title: flyteorg/flyte — momentum 76
item.description: Dynamic, resilient AI orchestration. Coordinate data, models, and compute as you build AI workflows.

item.title: THUDM/slime — momentum 75
item.description: slime is an LLM post-training framework for RL Scaling.

item.title: Kiln-AI/Kiln — momentum 74
item.description: Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.

item.title: shibing624/MedicalGPT — momentum 73
item.description: MedicalGPT: Training Your Own Medical GPT Model with ChatGPT Training Pipeline. 训练医疗大模型，实现了包括增量预训练(PT)、有监督微调(SFT)、RLHF、DPO、ORPO、GRPO。

item.title: h2oai/h2o-llmstudio — momentum 73
item.description: H2O LLM Studio - a framework and no-code GUI for fine-tuning LLMs. Documentation: https://docs.h2o.ai/h2o-llmstudio/

item.title: vllm-project/semantic-router — momentum 73
item.description: System Level Intelligent Router for Mixture-of-Models at Cloud, Data Center and Edge

item.title: ConardLi/easy-dataset — momentum 72
item.description: A powerful tool for creating datasets for LLM fine-tuning 、RAG and Eval

item.title: Nerogar/OneTrainer — momentum 71
item.description: OneTrainer is a one-stop solution for all your Diffusion training needs.

item.title: bghira/SimpleTuner — momentum 71
item.description: A general fine-tuning kit geared toward image/video/audio diffusion models.

item.title: FurkanGozukara/Stable-Diffusion — momentum 71
item.description: FLUX, Stable Diffusion, SDXL, SD3, LoRA, Fine Tuning, DreamBooth, Training, Automatic1111, Forge WebUI, SwarmUI, DeepFake, TTS, Animation, Text To Video, Tutorials, Guides, Lectures, Courses, ComfyUI, Google Colab, RunPod, Kaggle, NoteBooks, ControlNet, TTS, Voice Cloning, AI, AI News, ML, ML News,

item.title: roboflow/maestro — momentum 71
item.description: streamline the fine-tuning process for multimodal models: PaliGemma 2, Florence-2, and Qwen2.5-VL

item.title: DaoyuanLi2816/can-i-finetune-this — momentum 71
item.description: Estimate whether a Hugging Face model fits and fine-tunes on your local GPU.

item.title: google/tunix — momentum 70
item.description: A Lightweight LLM Post-Training Library

item.title: AI-Hypercomputer/maxtext — momentum 70
item.description: A simple, performant and scalable Jax LLM!

item.title: dstackai/dstack — momentum 70
item.description: Vendor-agnostic orchestration for training, inference and agentic workloads across NVIDIA, AMD, TPU, and Tenstorrent on clouds, Kubernetes, and bare metal.

item.title: kubeflow/trainer — momentum 70
item.description: Distributed AI Model Training and LLM Fine-Tuning on Kubernetes

item.title: pykeio/ort — momentum 69
item.description: Fast ML inference & training for ONNX models in Rust

item.title: radixark/miles — momentum 68
item.description: Miles is an enterprise-facing reinforcement learning framework for LLM and VLM post-training, forked from and co-evolving with slime.

item.title: ModelCloud/GPTQModel — momentum 67
item.description: LLM model quantization (compression) toolkit with HW acceleration support for Nvidia, AMD, Intel GPU and Intel/AMD/Apple CPU via HF, vLLM, and SGLang.

item.title: baidu-baige/LoongForge — momentum 67
item.description: A modular, scalable, high-performance training framework for LLMs, VLMs, diffusion, and embodied models.

item.title: thombanal/clip-finetune-recipes — momentum 67
item.description: Practical CLIP fine-tuning recipes — DDP training, LoRA, hard-negative mining, leakage checks.

item.title: mlabonne/llm-datasets — momentum 66
item.description: Curated list of datasets and tools for post-training.
